title: Build Systems, Not Code - Angie Jones, Agentic AI Foundation
summary: Angie Jones argues that AI coding agents shift engineering focus from writing individual lines of code to designing agentic systems at a higher level of abstraction. The core engineering disciplines, systems thinking, decomposition, separation of concerns, and state management, remain essential, with engineering value moving to the system architecture layer.
writeup: Angie Jones argues that AI coding agents move engineering focus from writing individual lines of code to designing agentic systems at a higher level of abstraction. The talk holds that core disciplines persist: systems thinking, decomposition, separation of concerns, and state management. The central claim is that engineering value shifts to the system architecture layer, with discussion of multi-agent systems, extended thinking, and context management.
